title: AFL locks in afternoon grand final for two more seasons
description: The AFL has locked in an afternoon grand final for two more seasons, keeping the premiership decider in its 2.30pm Saturday time slot. #grandfinal #aflgrandfinal #aflgf #afl #7afl

title: Security footage released to encourage safe travels
description: Brisbane airport have released security footage of travellers' accidents to encourage holidaymakers to keep their wits about them and prioritise safety this Easter. #brisbaneairport #airport #injury #holiday

title: Maintaining control no matter what
description: Borce and Karen Ristevski were married for 27 years, when suddenly Karen left the house and never returned. Eight months later, her body was discovered in Victorian bushland. title: Hercules C-130J flies over Sydney to mark Royal Australian Air Force's 105th birthday
description: The Royal Australian Air Force has marked its 105th birthday with a Hercules C-130J flyover above the Sydney CBD. It's part of a series of celebrations around the country this week. #hercules #jet #airforce #plane #aviation

title: State leaders rally as Australia’s fuel crisis worsens | 7NEWS
description: A month into the war in Iran and we're all paying the price, mostly at the fuel pump.  State leaders have rallied, trying to get on the same page before an emergency national cabinet meeting on Monday.  Some are pushing Prime Minister Anthony Albanese for fuel tax cuts, while others simply want better communication.
